author: hackerman-cosmic
text: Debug 2026-03-04: Reproduced source mismatch in current code path. start-default/start-from-upload/url routes create legacy sessions via InitializeSessionService and return state=initialized. /session/[id] loads mixed-source SessionView and stageMapper routes initialized to RECALL_REVIEW. RecallScreen always calls submitVoiceResponse(sessionId), but ProcessVoiceResponseHandler only resolves answer_sessions via findAnswerSessionById and throws INVALID_STATE when absent. Direct DB probe for session 21fc30c6-87b2-44b8-89b0-df6ebffe7656 shows sessions row exists (state=initialized) and no answer_sessions row.

author: hackerman-cosmic
text: New TDD plan created for explicit prep-session vs voice-session boundary fix (Contract A, no model merge): thoughts/searchable/shared/plans/2026-03-04--16-34--tdd-fix-voice-workflow-session-boundary-guards.md
